title: Kenneth Seaman
compiled_truth: Kenneth Seaman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2000-07-24), Kenneth Seaman sent 21 and received 60 emails, totalling 81 interactions.
